company.name_jp: 株式会社デルタエンジニアリング

research_notes: Part of DELTA GROUP. URL redirects from /totec/ to /delta-engineering/. No individual officer names found for デルタエンジニアリング specifically (group corporate page lists only company info, not officers). Group Twitter: @O_DELTAGROUP, @deltakyujin. Group Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/delta.group.jp/. Headquartered in Marunouchi, Tokyo.
